title: RoutingResult
description: The deterministic output of evaluating a rulebase against a confirmed profile snapshot. Fully determined by (snapshot, rulebase_version).

snapshot_id.description: The snapshot this result was computed from.

parameters.description: Structured parameters attached to the route.

confidence_basis.description: Routing confidence is not probabilistic; it is based on deterministic rule matching.

fired_rules.description: Ordered list of rule ids that fired, enabling a faithful trace.

deterministic.description: Always true. Asserts no non-deterministic input contributed to this result.
